---
title: "Yee Seng Chan"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/chanys
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/yeesengchan
---

I'm an applied AI scientist working on agent systems and LLM reliability. My background spans [insert: brief, e.g. "a PhD in NLP, DARPA-funded research in machine reading, and several years of industry work on conversational AI systems"].

I currently spend my time on the methodology of building AI agents that actually work — evaluation, failure analysis, and the engineering decisions that sit around the LLM (the "harness"). Most recently, this has meant studying how harness design choices affect reliability in bounded-corpus deep research agents.

This site is where I publish writing on applied AI, agent reliability, and the craft of shipping systems under real-world constraints.
